Table 2. Comparative results on the APTOS 2019 dataset.

Fig. 1. The proposed Attentive Fusion architecture. An input image is passed through two frozen backbones, pre-trained differently (Backbone 1: ImageNet + Finetuning; Backbone 2: CDAE SSL + Finetuning). Their features are concatenated and fed into trainable attention and classifier modules.
